title: An Investigational Study to Evaluate Experimental Medication BMS-986165 Compared to Placebo in Participants With Plaque Psoriasis (POETYK-PSO-3) in Mainland China, Taiwan, and South Korea

eligibility.text: Plaque psoriasis for at least 6 months
eligibility.justification: This criterion helps ensure a sufficient sample size to detect treatment effects.
This criterion ensures the study population is representative of patients with moderate to severe psoriasis, maximizing the likelihood of detecting a treatment effect.

eligibility.text: Candidate for phototherapy or systemic therapy
eligibility.justification: This criterion helps ensure that participants are eligible for treatment and can be followed up with appropriate interventions.
This criterion may serve to exclude patients with other types of skin conditions, potentially impacting the study's safety and generalizability.
This criterion helps ensure that participants are healthy enough to participate in the trial and minimize potential risks from infections.
This criterion ensures that participants have not previously received BMS-986165, potentially impacting the study's safety and generalizability.
This criterion indicates that additional criteria might be applied to ensure data quality or patient adherence, which could impact feasibility.
